alerts.name: alert-high-response-time
alerts.description: Alert when average web app response time exceeds 2 seconds

alerts.name: alert-high-cpu
alerts.description: Alert when VM CPU usage exceeds 80% for 5 minutes

alerts.name: alert-high-memory
alerts.description: Alert when VM memory usage exceeds 85%

alerts.name: alert-web-app-failure-rate
alerts.description: Alert when web app error rate exceeds 5%

alerts.name: alert-github-metrics-gap
alerts.description: Alert if GitHub metrics have not been received in 15 minutes

alerts.name: alert-system-error-events
alerts.description: Alert when critical system errors appear in event log
alerts.condition: Event where EventID in (7000, 7001, 7010) and EventLevelName == 'Error'

alerts.name: alert-disk-space-low
alerts.description: Alert when disk free space is below 10%

notes.deployment: Deploy using Azure CLI: az monitor metrics alert create --name <alert-name> --resource-group rg-demo-monitoring --scopes <resource-id> --condition <evaluation> --description <description>
notes.testing: Generate load using: artillery run load-test.yml
notes.verification: Check Log Analytics for: AppRequests, Perf, Event, GitHubMetrics_CL tables
